OBS-001.pattern: Dome light texture file parameter is xn__inputstexturefile_r3ah — not guessable from convention. Requires execute_python discovery.
OBS-001.context: Setting HDRI on dome light LOP in Houdini 21

OBS-002.pattern: rectlight is not a valid Houdini LOP node type. Available light types: distantlight, domelight, light, geometrylight, portallight, karmaskydomelight. Use 'light' for area/rect lights.
OBS-002.context: Creating rect/area lights in Solaris LOPs

OBS-003.pattern: create_material returns material_usd_path that doesn't match actual USD prim path. Returned: /materials/forge_red_mtl, actual: /materials/forge_red_mtl_shader. Always traverse stage to verify actual path.
OBS-003.context: Creating MaterialX materials via create_material MCP tool

OBS-004.pattern: read_material returns empty shader_params and shader_type for MaterialX materials. Cannot introspect MaterialX shader properties via MCP tool.

OBS-005.pattern: houdini_render on a karma LOP node hits 'permission error' (locked HDA). Must create a usdrender ROP in /out with loppath pointing to the karma LOP, then render via the ROP.
OBS-005.context: Rendering via Karma in Solaris pipeline

OBS-006.pattern: karmarenderer is not a valid LOP type name. Correct type is 'karma'. Also: karmarendersettings, karmarenderproperties, karmarenderproducts are valid.
OBS-006.context: Creating Karma render chain in Solaris

OBS-007.pattern: Light color parameters are split into individual R/G/B components: xn__inputscolor_ztar (R), xn__inputscolor_ztag (G), xn__inputscolor_ztab (B). No tuple set available via set_parm — requires 3 separate calls.
OBS-007.context: Setting light color on any USD light in Solaris

OBS-008.pattern: execute_python with atomic=true (default) prevents hou.undos.performUndo() inside the code block — 'Cannot undo within an undo group' error. Must pass atomic=false for any code that calls undo/redo.
OBS-008.context: Using undo system via execute_python MCP tool

OBS-009.pattern: No dedicated undo/redo MCP tool exists. Must use execute_python with atomic=false and call hou.undos.performUndo()/performRedo() manually.

OBS-010.pattern: synapse_search finds memories by keyword, synapse_recall uses a different matching algorithm and may return 0 results for the same content. memory_query with scope=scene misses entries written via add_memory (different storage scope). memory_query scope=all can timeout.

OBS-011.pattern: USD light parameter naming convention: xn__inputs{PropertyName}_{hash}. Common mappings: intensity=xn__inputsintensity_i0a, exposure=xn__inputsexposure_vya, color=xn__inputscolor_zta{r|g|b}, colorTemperature=xn__inputscolorTemperature_wcb, enableColorTemperature=xn__inputsenableColorTemperature_omb, textureFile=xn__inputstexturefile_r3ah (dome only).
OBS-011.context: Working with any USD light parameters in Houdini 21 Solaris
